zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Anderson於1636年5月12日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁布利德林頓時，他的父親William Marshall Anderson36歲，母親Eliza McArthur32歲。他於大約1658年與Susanna Hutton在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1683年5月5日在英國越可爾享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁布利德林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Anderson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: patronymic from the personal name Ander(s), a northern Middle English form of Andrew , + son ‘son’. The frequency of the surname in Scotland is attributable, at least in part, to the fact that Saint Andrew is the patron saint of Scotland, so the personal name has long enjoyed great popularity there. Legend has it that the saint's relics were taken to Scotland in the 4th century by a certain Saint Regulus. In North America, this surname has absorbed many cognate or like-sounding surnames in other languages, notably Scandinavian (see 3 and 4 below), but also Ukrainian Andreychenko etc.
German: patronymic from the personal name   Anders  , hence a cognate of 1 above.
Americanized form (and a less common Swedish variant) of Swedish   Andersson  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Anderson was born on 12 May 1636, in Bridlington, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Marshall Anderson, was 36 and his mother, Eliza McArthur, was 32. He married Susanna Hutton about 1658, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 5 May 1683, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Bridlington, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Bridlington, East Riding of Yorkshire, E: Bridlington, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Anderson est né le 12 mai 1636, à Bridlington, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Marshall Anderson, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Eliza McArthur, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Susanna Hutton environ 1658, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 5 mai 1683, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Bridlington, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Mai 1636 in Bridlington, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Marshall Anderson 36 und seine Mutter Eliza McArthur 32. Er hat um 1658 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Susanna Hutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 5. Mai 1683 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Bridlington, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Bridlington, East Riding of Yorkshire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 브리들링턴
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Anderson(이)가 1636년 5월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 브리들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Marshall Anderson(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Eliza McArthur(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1658년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Susanna Hutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1683년 5월 5일 영국 요르크실르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 브리들링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.Bridlington, East Riding of Yorkshire, E: Bridlington, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Anderson nasceu em 12 de maio de 1636, em Bridlington, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Marshall Anderson, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Eliza McArthur, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Susanna Hutton aproximadamente 1658, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 5 de maio de 1683, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Bridlington, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Bridlington, East Riding of Yorkshire, E: бридлингтон, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Anderson родился 12 мая 1636 г. в местности бридлингтон, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Marshall Anderson было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Eliza McArthur, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna Hutton около 1658 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 5 мая 1683 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности бридлингтон, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания.
